svg.title: No-FFN accuracy across six FFN variants showing the full decomposition
svg.desc: Bar chart with six bars on add-7. Dense FFN at 9.6 percent and GLU at 10.1 percent are at chance. Narrow FFN at 28.6 percent and MoE top-2 at 30 percent show partial recovery from capacity reduction. MoE top-1 learned at 53 percent and MoE top-1 random at 55 percent show full redistribution, with their equivalence indicated by a non-significance bracket.
